positive: Stylized illustration of a whimsical forest clearing at dawn. A central group of anthropomorphized, glowing woodland creatures (foxes, rabbits, deer) are gathered around a stylized bonfire, casting warm, orange and cool, blue bioluminescent light onto the ferns and giant mushrooms. The scene utilizes a clean, graphic silhouette style with high contrast and saturated jewel tones. The composition is perfectly centered and framed for apparel print, featuring deep negative space around the main action for printing purposes. Art deco influence meets contemporary forest ethereal style. Flat vector aesthetic, perfect for screen printing.
negative: realistic, hyperdetailed, photo, photorealistic, watermark, text, logo, signature, artifacts, blurred, bad anatomy, multiple limbs, grainy, noise, oversaturation
